# Mass Balance Analysis

**Summary**: A calculation method to determine the distribution of elements among various products in a chemical reaction.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2020]] applied mass balance analysis to calculate the selectivity of ammonia oxidation to nitrogen.

- The selectivity of ammonia oxidation to nitrogen was 81.50%. ([[2020-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2020, p. 50]])
